value: AMD optimization: Best params MACD(18/37/5), RSI(15/70/20), metric=sharpe. Sharpe=1.78, Return=217%, MaxDD=-26%. AMD benefits from faster MACD (responsive to semiconductor cycles). Major improvement from previous Sharpe=0.86.

feature-importance-multi-method-decision: Replaced single-model importance (biased—sees future data) with multi-method walk-forward approach. Tier 1 (implemented): (1) Avg LightGBM gain across WF windows (free, model-internal), (2) Marginal IC per feature per window (free, model-free), (3) TreeSHAP on test sets (~15min, model-external). Look for convergence—feature important in all 3 is real. Tier 2 (future): clustered importance (de Prado) for correlated features. Tier 3 (skip): drop-column ablation (50x cost), stability selection (redundant with 265 windows), MI estimation (unreliable at our sample sizes). Key reference: Lopez de Prado, Advances in Financial ML (2018).

feature-selection-regression-validated-2026-03-15: After fixing Sharpe normalization bug (overlapping window weights not normalized), re-ran regression test reg_20260315_075520 (40min, 265 windows, 7d step). Results: Baseline Sharpe=0.78 (338% return). Best config at Step 6 (+adx): Sharpe=1.34 (959% return). Top features by marginal Sharpe: bollinger +0.64, macd +0.15, adx +0.08. Features that hurt: rsi -0.28, momentum -0.24, obv -0.18. OBV has +0.05 IC gain but -0.18 Sharpe loss. Final (all features): Sharpe=0.89, RankIC=0.52, TotalReturn=442%.

regression-test-reg_20260315_152332-tech-giants: 38min, 265 windows, 7d step. Baseline Sharpe=0.78 (RankIC=0.41). Peak at Step 6 (+adx): Sharpe=1.34. Final (all features): Sharpe=0.89, RankIC=0.52, ExcessReturn=17.3%. Top features by marginal Sharpe: bollinger +0.64 (21.9% importance, p<1e-12), macd +0.15 (10.4%, p<1e-5). Features that hurt: rsi -0.28, momentum -0.24, obv -0.18. OBV paradox: +0.05 IC but -0.18 Sharpe. GUARD VIOLATIONS: every step violates max_drawdown (-72% to -55% vs -30% threshold) and train_test_sharpe_ratio (18x-727x vs 2.5x threshold). Severe overfitting. Tier 1 importance working: momentum uses 25.1% model capacity but hurts Sharpe. Optimal set: baseline + macd + bollinger + adx. Consistent with reg_20260315_075520.

sharpe-normalization-bug-fix: Aggregate Sharpe showed -0.10 (total_return=-1.0, vol=9.79) despite per-window Sharpe mean=1.73. Root cause: _calculate_portfolio_returns didn't normalize by total_weight. With 265 overlapping walk-forward windows (7d step, 6mo test), each business day had positions from ~130 windows, creating ~130x effective leverage. Fix: port_ret /= total_weight after the position loop. Per-window metrics were correct because single-window calls had total_weight≈1.0.

SLV silver optimization: Best params MACD(5/59/5), RSI(13/80/39), metric=sharpe_dd. Sharpe=2.47, Return=407%, MaxDD=-12%. Silver strongly prefers very slow MACD (trend-following). Consistent across all optimization runs.

walk-forward-step-7d: Changed backtest step from 1d to 7d (config.yaml step_value=7). Reduces windows ~7x (1849→265) with minimal accuracy loss for 6-month test windows. Combined with 11-core multiprocessing, full regression drops from ~20h to ~2.5h. GPU not worth it for this workload (small window sizes). Revert to step=1 only for final production validation.
